source.title: Upgrading and Maintaining Starbases in Starbased
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “Upgrading and Maintaining Starbases in Starbased.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Starbases are critical hubs in Starbased, supporting crafting, resource management, and faction influence. To keep them operational and progressing, you need to upgrade and maintain them regularly.
Upgrading Starbases
Purpose: Unlock new crafting recipes and higher functionality.
How:
Deliver specific crafted materials required for the next tier.
Assign crew members for a set time to complete upgrades.
Tip: Higher tiers need more complex goods and more crew.
Maintaining Starbases
Purpose: Keep starbases active and effective for crafting and support.
How:
Regularly supply resources like Food, Toolkits, and other essentials.
Without upkeep, starbase functions (like crafting) may pause or slow down.
Investing in starbase upgrades and upkeep ensures your faction’s strength and unlocks more opportunities in Star Atlas
